test_cases.description: Verifies correct installation command and usage pattern for a shadcn component
test_cases.input: I need to add a date picker to my Next.js app. How do I use shadcn for this?

test_cases.description: Verifies correct CSS variable theming approach for shadcn customization
test_cases.input: How do I change the primary color of all shadcn components to match my brand purple #7c3aed?

test_cases.description: Verifies correct Form component pattern integrating react-hook-form with shadcn
